Interface IBuildSeamlinesParameters2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to the build seamlines operation.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("CB6DBC1B-4664-4748-A408-D2E5F8309873")]
public interface IBuildSeamlinesParameters2 : IBuildSeamlinesParameters

Indicates whether the ascending flag of OrderBy.

bool Ascending { get; set; }
